name: @stack/widget
description: The worked example of the 4th bucket: a distributable embeddable widget served to THIRD PARTIES — a floating feedback button that self-mounts into any host page. Two build outputs: an IIFE (dist/widget.js) for <script src> embed on any site, and an ESM build for npm consumers. May import libs/* (shared code); never apps/services. Terminal — nothing internal consumes it.

scripts.build: bun run build:iife && bun run build:esm

$publishConfig_comment: EXAMPLE ONLY — this package is `private: true` and is NOT actually published. The `publishConfig`/`files`/`exports` above show the shape a real distributable takes: `bun publish` (drop `private`) would ship `dist/` (the built IIFE + ESM) to npm. `types` points at source for the example; a real publish adds `tsc --emitDeclarationOnly` to emit `dist/index.d.ts`.
